facts.statement: The Amazon River (source to sea) is 5,000 km long
facts.actual: 6,400–6,500 km including its full source system

facts.statement: The Amazon River discharges 400,000 m³ of water per second at its peak
The Amazon River basin covers 5 million km²
The Amazon River's maximum depth is 100 meters
The Amazon River covers about 50% of South America
facts.actual: The river covers about 40% of South America
